description: Unit: SLA clock state machine returns met/remaining/overdue/paused correctly across sla_* column permutations, including null policy
Unit: timeline lane filters reduce visible entries client-side without refetch and report correct counts
Unit: day-break grouping inserts separators exactly at calendar-day boundaries and labels today as 'Today'
Component: each timeline entry type renders its treatment (client bubble, internal label, resolution marker, time badge, system line, alert warning)
Component: composer placeholder uses contact first name with 'Write a reply' fallback; segment control switches client/internal/resolution
Component: every tile renders its designed empty state for a minimal ticket (no contact, no SLA, no schedule, no interactions, no time)
Component: tile-level data error renders visible in-tile error state rather than blank card
Component: copy audit — rendered tile headers and key strings match the PRD house-voice table
E2E (Playwright): flag off renders legacy screen with no toggle; flag on shows Grid|Entry toggle; switching to Grid renders bento; choice persists across reload
E2E (Playwright): rich fixture journey — open ticket, verify timeline shows comments, time entries, and system events with day breaks
E2E (Playwright): edit status + priority from hero, Save changes; values persist after reload and a system event appears in the timeline
E2E (Playwright): unsaved-changes guard blocks navigation after editing a hero field until saved or cancelled
E2E (Playwright): post a client reply and an internal note from the composer; both appear in the stream with correct treatment and in the comments data
E2E (Playwright): 'More details' drawer edits (category, location) merge into the same batch save as hero edits
E2E (Playwright): checklist item toggle and add-item work from the Checklist tile
E2E (Playwright): timer start/pause and 'Add time entry' flow work from the Time logged tile; new entry appears in tile and timeline
E2E (Playwright): capability sweep — documents add/link, watchers add/remove, agent team add, assets link, feedback card, delete ticket all reachable and functional on the bento layout
E2E (Playwright): AlgaDesk mode hides SLA, Time logged, and Materials tiles with no layout gaps
E2E (Playwright): client-portal ticket detail renders identically with the flag on (portal unaffected)
note: Verified via static analysis: client-portal ticket tree imports zero bento modules and uses its own separate TicketDetails component (not the MSP one modified here).

description: Visual smoke: bento layout in dark theme — tiles, timeline lanes, and chips readable (no hardcoded light backgrounds)
Visual smoke: responsive breakpoints at ~1280px, ~1024px, and mobile width show documented re-flow with no horizontal scroll
